title: Create Evolution
description: Enjoy a new adventure surrounded by technology with this great expansion of the famous Create mod!
body:
[![Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Create_Evolution/MP_CreateEvolution_header.webp)](https://bit.ly/4nTC2p4) Due to many requests, we have published most of our modpacks on Modrinth. But keep the following in mind: - There are many **content and optimization** mods that can't be added to Modrinth (they don't allow it). - The **quests files have been added**, but we cannot add FTB Quests to the modpack in Modrinth. You can add it yourself so you can play with them. - We are also **unable to upload serverpacks** here. **If you want to play with the full experience, we strongly recommend that you download the [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/create-evolution-renewed) version.** ## This modpack centers around Create 6.0, the latest version of the beloved mechanical automation mod. It includes many of the most important Create addons, expanding the experience with trains, electricity, enchantments, and more. And quests for Create 6.0 are now available, as well as for many of its most important and fun add-ons!

If you are looking for a server to play any modpack with your friends, [**Bisect Hosting**](https://bit.ly/4nTC2p4) is your solution! They have the best quality-price Minecraft servers, and with the code "Lupin" you will receive a 25% discount. ![Summary](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Create_Evolution/MP_CreateEvolution_description.webp) Create Evolution is a Create-based modpack where your goal is to build complex machines, kinetic factories, and even massive trains using the power of Create 6.0 and its best addons. You'll start small, but soon you'll be automating farms, powering entire systems, and building beautiful contraptions that move, mine, and craft for you. Quests will guide you through your engineering journey, and many more are coming to cover all major Create expansions. Along the way, explore enhanced biomes, decorative structures, and a tech-rich world filled with surprises. ⚙️ Dive into mechanical creativity with Create 6.0 as the centerpiece, offering endless automation, kinetic contraptions, and immersive engineering tools. 🚂 Packed with the most popular Create addons, including Big Cannons, Enchantment Industry, Deco, Jetpack, Structures Arise, and more, expanding the mod like never before. 📘 Includes a custom questline to guide you through the core of Create, with plans to expand quests to major addons in future updates. 🛠️ Enhanced with complementary mods like Mekanism, Immersive Engineering and Refined Storage offering deep tech progression and rich survival content. 🎮 Optimized for performance and compatible with shaders thanks to mods like Oculus and Embeddium, ensuring smooth gameplay on most systems. ![FAQ](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Create_Evolution/MP_CreateEvolution_faq.webp) ### Minecraft keeps loading? You enter the world but your FPS is low? ### Please make sure to increase the RAM in case you need it, most problems are due to this. If you use the curseforge app, it's as easy as clicking on profile options, uncheck the option to use default memory system and move the bar to the right (at least we recommend 5GB or 5120 MB). ### Is there an error with your server? ### Unfortunately, when setting up a server on your own, or hiring a hosting that I have not recommended, the modpack may not work. All my modpacks work perfectly with **[Bisect Hosting](https://bit.ly/4nTC2p4)**, so I recommend 100% to hire such hosting. Also, you will get a **[25% discount if you do it through this link](https://bit.ly/4nTC2p4)** and use the code "Lupin". Please note that for this modpack, we recommend a minimum of 7GB of RAM. If you are a large number of players, you should consider increasing the amount of RAM even more. ![Screenshots](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Create_Evolution/MP_CreateEvolution_screenshots.webp) ![Screenshots 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/dH8uNXNo/images/30e4b62e9eeb3e11bcb9841bf1f56fd22f619a5f.png) ![Screenshots 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/dH8uNXNo/images/30d37e48e8026eb9467c52415ac8602e1592b4e1.jpeg) [![DISCORD](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MultiRecipe/BH_Lupin_Discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/X8VY5WMbe4) .
